name: glory-rs
description: Comandos unificados para el monorepo Rust + React

scripts.dev: concurrently --names BACK,FRONT --prefix-colors blue,green "cargo run --bin glory-backend" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.check: cargo check && cargo clippy && npm --prefix frontend run type-check
scripts.verify: cargo check && cargo clippy -- -D warnings && cargo test && npm --prefix frontend run type-check
